PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $145.00 SERVED MAR-02-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CARHART SR, THOMAS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-14-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-14-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE: JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JOSEPH HUDSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THOMAS CARHART IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUDSON, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARHART, THOMAS CARHART SR, THOMAS $925.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $925.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,125.00 FILED BY HUDSON, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT CARHART, THOMAS CARHART SR, THOMAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 04/23/2025. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF.(RETURN TO SENDER ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN UNABLE TO FORWARD)
